items.title: Ozempic and similar weight-loss drugs linked to 30% lower breast cancer risk
items.summary: A large study found that women taking GLP-1 drugs, the medication class behind Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, and Zepbound, were about 30% less likely to develop breast cancer. items.title: The supplements older adults actually need and the ones they don't
items.summary: Supplements are often marketed as shortcuts to better health, but for many older adults, the real issue is whether they have a specific deficiency. items.title: Scientists sound the alarm as dangerous amoebas spread globally
items.summary: Scientists warn that free-living amoebae may be an underappreciated public health threat, capable of causing deadly infections and shielding other dangerous microbes from water treatment.
